name: Read URL
description: Fetch a single public URL and extract its main readable content as clean markdown (Firefox Reader-style). Use after web_search when a snippet is not enough and you need the actual page text. Returns { title, byline, content_markdown, source_url, length }. Hard 8s timeout. 1 MB HTML cap, 50 000 char markdown cap. Respects robots.txt. Does NOT follow cross-domain redirects.

url.description: Absolute http(s) URL of the page to read.

maxChars.description: Cap on returned markdown length. Default 12000.
